name: Super Armored Robot Armed Black Iron "C"
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>甲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>器</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ロボ ブラックアイアン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｇ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_rom: Chō Sōkō Heiki Robo Burakku Aian Jī
name_jp_tl: Super Armored Weapon Robo - Black Iron G
desc: If you have 3 Insect monsters with the same name in your GY: You can target any number of them; Special Summon this card from your hand, then equip them to this card. You can send 1 monster equipped to this card by this card's effect to the GY; destroy all monsters your opponent controls with ATK greater than or equal to the ATK of the monster sent to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Super Armored Robot Armed Black Iron "C"" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you have 3 Insect monsters with the same name in your GY: You can target any number of them; Special Summon this card from your hand, then equip them to this card. You can send 1 monster equipped to this card by this card's effect to the GY; destroy all monsters your opponent controls with ATK greater than or equal to the ATK of the monster sent to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Super Armored Robot Armed Black Iron "C"" once per turn.
eff: If you have 3 Insect monsters with the same name in your GY: You can target any number of them; Special Summon this card from your hand, then equip them to this card. You can send 1 monster equipped to this card by this card's effect to the GY; destroy all monsters your opponent controls with ATK greater than or equal to the ATK of the monster sent to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Super Armored Robot Armed Black Iron "C"" once per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
